description:
Vampire Crawlers is available now on Steam, Xbox Series X|S, Game Pass Ultimate, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch 2!

Vampire Crawlers turns the snowballing thrill of the original hit into a tactical deckbuilder where you build busted decks, explore familiar dungeons from a new perspective, and unleash world-ending combos. 

🔗 Vampire Crawlers FAQ: https://poncle.games/vampire-crawlers-faq

📰 Steam News: https://steamcommunity.com/app/3265700/allnews/

Developed by poncle, in collaboration with Nosebleed Interactive

Pick up your garlic & join our Discord community 🧄
https://discord.gg/vampire-survivors

🎮 Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3265700/Vampire_Crawlers_The_Turbo_Wildcard_from_Vampire_Survivors/ 
💚 Xbox: https://www.xbox.com/en-GB/games/store/vampire-crawlers-the-turbo-wildcard-from-vampire-survivors/9nmpvj7tcfd0 
💙 PlayStation: https://store.playstation.com/en-gb/concept/10015481
❤️ Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/en-gb/Games/Nintendo-Switch-download-software/Vampire-Crawlers-The-Turbo-Wildcard-from-Vampire-Survivors-3055039.html 
❤️ Nintendo Switch 2: https://www.nintendo.com/en-gb/Games/Nintendo-Switch-2-games/Vampire-Crawlers-The-Turbo-Wildcard-from-Vampire-Survivors-3074959.html

https://poncle.games/vampire-crawlers

Check out our new poncle Games discord 🎮
http://discord.gg/RpnG5Y5JKV

Follow us on socials for more updates:
https://twitter.com/poncle_vampire
https://www.tiktok.com/@poncle_games
https://www.instagram.com/ponclegames/

🔗 https://beacons.ai/poncle

Vampire Crawlers by poncle

#VampireCrawlers #VampireSurvivors #roguelite 

deck builder, card battler, turn based strategy, poncle, indie game
